master_scalar_note: Internal CoT reasoning-diversity metric (lower = more diverse). NOT a benchmark and NOT a capability claim.

measured.grounded_accuracy_note: Fraction of held-out appreciation generations that are well-formed and name the requested quality, verified by Python. A real, modest number from a tiny model — not a capability claim.
measured.teacher_model: none (deterministic Python-verified synthetic data; no distillation)

training_data: license-clean synthetic (deterministic, Python-verified labels; no model distillation)
